results.title: Kajang, Selangor
results.description:
NEW PROJECT FOR SALE❗❗❗
MYRA PUTRI APARTMENT @ Desa Pinggiran Putra,  Kajang
=======================
BOOKING:RM250 SAHAJA
✔ 2 parking lot (To be Confirm side by side or not)
✔ Free SPA Fee, Loan Agreement Fee & MOT (for 1st house Buyer)
✔ 2 Block, Block A & B
✔ 2lift + 1 service lift per block in 1 lift lobby each Block
✔ Low Density, 310 unit sahaja
✔ Partially Furnish
✔ Completion On Q1 2026
PROPERTY DETAILS :
# Type: Apartment
# Build-Up Size : 904 Sqft
# 3 BedRooms
# 2 Bathrooms (1 in Master Bedroom)
# Tenure: LEASEHOLD (Malay Reserved)
# Price: BERMULA dari RM385K (10% rebate 1st house)
# Maintenance Fee: RM0.25 / sqft
FACILITIES :
# Gated & 24 Hours Guarded
# Management Office
# Nursery
# Shop/Kioks
# Surau
# Multipurpose hall /  Badminton Court
# Playground
# Basketball Court
AMMENITIES :
# SK Desa Pinggiran Putra, SM Abu Bakar Baginda, SM Presint 5
# Surau Al-Mukhlisin, Surau Al-Ikhwan, Masjid Al-Hijrah
# Commercial shoplot, 99speedmart, Klinik, Kedai Baiki Kereta & Motorsikal
# Future Caltex Station, Petronas Presint 16
# Alamanda Putrajaya, IOI City Mall Putrajaya
# Akademi Bola Sepak, UiTM Dengkil
EASY ACCESS:
# To Dengkil, Sungai Merab, Salak Tinggi, Bangi (Sungai Merab route)
# To Putrajaya, Cyberjaya
# Mex Highway
# ELite Highway
# Kajang Silk
# LDP Highway
====================
** Booking procedure:
1. Booking Form
2. IC photo
3. Booking Fee (RM250)
4. Book Unit
5. Email detail(form), IC & Slip/Receipt
6. Submit dokumen to Panel Banker / LPPSA
7. After loan approved, sign SPA
